name: Note: ITC RB posts refer to ITC full regular budget posts, which are not part of the proposed United Nations regular budget staffing table. panel_heading: Organizational structure and post distribution for 2026
name: Note: ITC RB posts refer to ITC full regular budget posts, which are not part of the proposed United Nations regular budget staffing table. XB posts are funded through the special account forcosts. The total number of posts for 2026 remains unchanged compared with 2025: 160 funded from the ITC full regular budget and 20 from extrabudgetary sources. Abbreviations: ASG, Assistant Secretary-General; GS (OL), General Service (Other level); ITC RB, International Trade Centre full regular budget; XB, extrabudgetary. a Redeployment. b Reassignment. c Reclassification.
